name: useUnmount
description: Hook that defines the logic when unmounting a component
examples: useUnmount(() => console.log('This effect runs on component unmount'));

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The callback function to be invoked on component unmount

source.source: * @param {() => void} callback The callback function to be invoked on component unmount

tokens.name: callback
tokens.description: The callback function to be invoked on component unmount
